About Contact
About Contact
Privacy policy

How visitor data and communication are handled.

This policy is written for a content website. It covers common scenarios such as analytics, email enquiries, affiliate links, and future newsletter functionality.

Information collected

Basic site usage data

The site may collect standard analytics information such as page views, referrers, device categories, and browser information in order to understand site performance and improve content.

Direct contact

Email correspondence

If you contact Urban Harvest Lab directly, your email address and the contents of your message may be retained for the purpose of responding and maintaining a record of the conversation.

Affiliate links

Third-party destinations

Some outbound links may go to third-party retailers or partners. Those websites operate under their own privacy policies and terms.

Future newsletter

Email subscriptions

If newsletter signup is added later, subscribers should be able to opt out easily. Email delivery and storage would then also be subject to the privacy terms of the chosen email service provider.

Urban Harvest Lab

Calm, practical growing guidance for balconies, patios, and indoor shelves.

Science-based guides for urban gardening, hydroponics, grow lights, and small-space food growing.
